    "# Tutorial 4: Comparing to EM Simulations (coming soon)\n",
    "\n",
    "This tutorial will show how to import Touchstone / FEM results and compare them to `simpleLOMs` circuit models.\n",
    "\n",
    "Planned topics:\n",
    "- Loading measured or simulated `.s2p` files with `scikit-rf`\n",
    "- Aligning port definitions and reference impedance with `analyze_system` inputs\n",
    "- Using circle-fit helpers from `simpleLOMs.analysis` on imported data\n",
    "- Quantifying residual error with the same metrics as `analyze_system`\n",
    "\n",
    "For now, use **Tutorial 1** for single-device fitting and **Tutorial 2** for accuracy mapping.\n"
   ]
